2171510.name: Zen Golf Demo
2171510.description:
Zen Golf is a relaxing and chill mini golf experience. Get lost in the beautiful zen gardens and all original lo-fi Japanese soundtrack with up to 20 friends on over 180 holes! Or play against state of the art AI opponents for rewarding and fun solo play.

Aimed at doing things differently, rather than the over the top and in your face insanity of other titles, Zen Golf is a calm and enjoyable experience while still maintaining that fun quirky course design that mini golf is known for.



FEATURES:
180+ holes across 20+ courses (40 holes across 5 courses available in the demo)

Multiplayer up to 20 players

Local multiplayer only requires one controller or mouse/keyboard, the perfect party game!

1+ hour of all original Japanese lo-fi hip-hop. With music as beautiful and relaxing as the atmosphere you'll never want to leave! (Demo only includes 4 songs)

Loads of customization options, every player is sure to find something that suites their personality!

Prefer to play alone? State of the art AI opponents play differently every game, creating a unique and fun experience even for solo players.

Beautiful hand-crafted levels, each with their own garden. A delightful atmosphere you could dream of being lost in.

Super optimized graphics allowing for great performance even on low end systems. Run beautiful graphics even on laptops with integrated graphics!
